# Dharmendra Awasthi — Full Professional Resume & CV

Dharmendra Awasthi is a Lead Engineer and Senior Software Engineer specializing in designing and building high-performance backend platforms, distributed microservices, and event-driven architectures.

## Contact Information
- **Full Name**: Dharmendra Awasthi
- **Title**: Lead Engineer / Senior Software Engineer
- **Email**: er.dharamk@gmail.com
- **Phone**: +91-9454318045
- **Location**: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India
- **GitHub**: [https://github.com/dharamcodes](https://github.com/dharamcodes)
- **LinkedIn**: [https://www.linkedin.com/in/dharamcodes/](https://www.linkedin.com/in/dharamcodes/)
- **Website**: [https://dharamcodes.github.io/](https://dharamcodes.github.io/)

---

## Executive Summary
Senior Backend Engineer and Tech Lead with 9+ years of experience constructing high-availability distributed systems and cloud-native microservices for telecom, retail, fintech, and gaming sectors. Expert in Java, Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, Apache Kafka, and AWS. Demonstrated success designing systems processing 1,500+ TPS and serving over 10 million users. Proven track record leading engineering squads of up to 4, governing high-level and low-level designs (HLD/LLD), and driving cross-functional releases. Currently pursuing a part-time PhD in Computer Science & Artificial Intelligence at NIT Nagpur.

---

## Technical Skills & Expertise

### Languages & Frameworks
- **Languages**: Java (8/11/17+), Python, SQL (PostgreSQL, MySQL), Bash Scripting
- **Frameworks**: Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, Hibernate ORM, JPA, Reactive Streams
- **Testing**: JUnit, Mockito, Testcontainers, TDD (Test-Driven Development)

### Architecture & System Design
- **Architectural Patterns**: Microservices, Event-Driven Architecture, CQRS, Saga Pattern, Outbox Pattern, Circuit Breakers, Domain-Driven Design (DDD)
- **Systems Design**: HLD (High-Level Design), LLD (Low-Level Design), Performance Tuning, Latency Optimization, Capacity Planning

### Cloud & Messaging Infrastructure
- **Message Brokers**: Apache Kafka (Leader-Worker patterns, consumer groups, partition management)
- **Cloud Computing**: Amazon Web Services (AWS) - EC2, S3, SQS, Lambda, ECS, CloudWatch, IAM
- **Databases & Caches**: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis (Caching, Session management), Elasticsearch

### DevOps, Tools & Infrastructure
- **Containerization**: Docker, Kubernetes (K8s)
- **CI/CD & Builds**: Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, Terraform (IaC), Maven, Gradle
- **APIs**: REST APIs, gRPC, OAuth2, JSON Web Tokens (JWT)

### Observability & Monitoring
- **Monitoring Tools**: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana), Splunk, Zipkin, Distributed Tracing

---

## Professional Work Experience

### Senior Software Engineer (Tech Lead) | Luxoft (Client: Tesco)
**Bengaluru, India** | *Jul 2024 – Present*
- **Orchestration Systems**: Designed and implemented an Orchestrator System using Spring Boot microservices, supporting 1,500+ TPS at 99.9% uptime.
- **Data Ingestion Pipelines**: Engineered Leader-Worker scheduling and processing using Apache Kafka, facilitating over 1 million message ingestions daily with zero data loss.
- **Architecture & Design**: Managed end-to-end HLD and LLD for 8+ major platform features, applying failure-mode analysis and CI/CD quality gates.
- **Generative AI Integration**: Spearheaded integration of LLMs for content validation pipelines, reducing manual review efforts by 30%.
- **Leadership & Mentoring**: Mentored 3 backend engineers on reactive architectures, system design, and Kafka patterns, reducing onboarding ramp-up times by 40%.
- **Product Strategy**: Led quarterly product releases and roadmap alignment with 3+ distinct business units.

### Senior Member of Technical Staff | Ness Digital Engineering
**Bengaluru, India** | *May 2023 – May 2024*
- **Greenfield Product Delivery**: Spearheaded a brand new backend platform from scratch using Java, Spring Boot, and Spring Cloud, deploying it to production within 4 months.
- **Team Leadership**: Directed a team of 4 software engineers in design reviews, agile ceremonies, and sprint execution, improving overall team velocity by 25%.
- **Latency Optimization**: Reduced core API latencies by 50% through targeted Redis caching implementations and concurrent execution using `CompletableFuture`.
- **Configuration Management**: Created a dynamic runtime feature-toggle infrastructure using Spring Cloud Config, decreasing deployment lead times by 60%.
- **Client Engagement**: Formulated technical roadmaps and product milestones for 4 key enterprise clients.

### Senior Software Engineer II | Airtel Africa
**Gurugram, India** | *Feb 2022 – May 2023*
- **High-Throughput Billing**: Crafted high-throughput telecom billing microservices serving 10 million active subscribers across Africa.
- **Query Management**: Designed and rolled out a reusable customer query management engine, lowering average query resolution time by 40%.
- **Code Refactoring**: Restructured legacy packages using Strategy and Factory patterns, shrinking code duplication metrics by 35%.
- **Quality Standards**: Standardized OpenAPI/Swagger definitions across 12+ microservices and achieved a 95% test coverage rate via strict Test-Driven Development (TDD).

### Senior Software Engineer | Aristocrat Technologies
**Gurugram, India** | *Jul 2021 – Feb 2022*
- **Gaming Platform Engineering**: Enhanced and tuned Java microservices for B2B Class 2/3 gaming platforms, increasing transaction throughput capacity by 20%.
- **Event Sourcing**: Designed event-sourced tracking engines for compliance and auditing, achieving 99.5% data accuracy.
- **Reactive Streams**: Implemented asynchronous operations using reactive streams to reduce peak-load API latency by 35%.

### Member of Technical Staff | Oracle
**Bengaluru, India** | *Jan 2021 – Jul 2021*
- **TMF-Compliant APIs**: Built TM Forum-compliant order-management REST APIs in Java/Spring Boot, automating 40% of manual processing tasks.
- **API Performance**: Leveraged Redis caching and SQL query tuning to bring down API response times from 800ms to under 200ms.

### Development Consultant | CSG International
**Bengaluru, India** | *Sep 2018 – Nov 2020*
- **Telecom & CRM Integration**: Developed 3 primary Java-based services and CRM integrations supporting 5 million subscribers.
- **Reusable Frontend Libraries**: Formulated a shared UI library adopted by 3 separate application teams, boosting UI delivery speed by 25%.

### System Analyst | Amdocs
**Pune, India** | *Feb 2017 – Sep 2018*
- **Performance Refactoring**: Refactored legacy Java modules and optimized complex SQL queries to deliver a 30% increase in batch processing performance.
- **SLA Management**: Maintained a 100% SLA compliance rate across high-stress production environments.

---

## Featured Open-Source Projects

### smc4j
- **Description**: Java 17+ open-source finance library implementing Smart Money Concepts (SMC) for algorithmic trading.
- **Link**: [https://github.com/smc4j/smc4j](https://github.com/smc4j/smc4j)

### tradesmc-api
- **Description**: Spring Boot REST API for running backtests on SMC-based trading strategies.
- **Link**: [https://github.com/dharamcodes/tradesmc-api](https://github.com/dharamcodes/tradesmc-api)

### ConnectX
- **Description**: A modern Kafka management studio and desktop client built with Tauri, React, and TypeScript. Enables developers to manage clusters, inspect topics, produce/consume data, and view metrics.
- **Link**: [https://github.com/dharamcodes/connectx](https://github.com/dharamcodes/connectx)
